flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Five Towns College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.2k → $30.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Five Towns College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.2k → $30.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Five Towns College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Five Towns College rose 61% between 2021 and 2024 (30.1% → 48.5%).
